name: Powersoft S.p.A.
summary: Powersoft S.p.A. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of pro-audio amplifiers. It offers 8-channel, 4-channel, 2-channel, and touring amplifiers; Deva, a networked multimedia system; and various OEM solutions. The company also provides accessories, including processing, KDSP, KAESOP, and programming boards, as well as plug-in output transformers, step-up cards, adapters, Deva mounting kits, and heatsinks. Its products have applications in hospitality industry, including theme parks, resorts and hotels, and bars and restaurants; retail industry comprising malls and shopping centers, and shops; houses of worship; and corporate buildings, as well as venues, such as stadiums, arts venues and theatres, convention centers, museums, and clubs. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Scandicci, Italy.
